table.name: vtiger_product
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_product` ( `productid` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `model_number` VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`productid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_productcf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_productcf` ( `productid` int(11) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`productid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
